raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I noticed unauthorized charges on my account from XXXX that I did not purchased. I reported them to Citi Bank. They cancelled my account and re-issued me a new credit card. There was XXXX charged that they reversed the credit on XX/XX/XXXX in the amount of {$35.00}, {$25.00} and {$10.00}. I called again to re-open the dispute. I was told they had to re-investigate the charges and they had up to 90 days to investigate. On Feburary XXXX, XXXX I sent a letter to them along with proof of my XXXX account showing the purchases that I made and there was no purchases in the amounts that I was disputing. It's now XX/XX/XXXX and still no resolution and they now saying they have to send it to billing department for investigation and they have up to XXXX billing cycles to reveiw. In the meantime, they won't re-verse the charges which is causing my account to be past due with interest fees and late payments and my XXXX XXXX XXXX has dropped to XXXX due to this as they reported as non payment to the credit bureau. I refuse to pay for charges that I did not make!!!
